llm.title: LLM
llm.apiKeyMissing: API key not configured for this model

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey
login.oauthNotice: Set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to enable Google sign-in. Demo Login works without it.
login.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Check client ID and backend GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.
login.googleLoadError: Could not load Google sign-in. Check your network connection.
login.devError: Dev login failed — is the backend running?
login.terms: By signing in you agree to our Terms of Service.
login.footer: Powered by Gemini & DeepSeek · Built for learners

dashboard.overview: Here's your learning overview for today.
dashboard.masterySnapshotDesc: Quick visual overview — see full analysis in Learning Report
dashboard.tipPlaceholder: Start a session and I'll personalise your tips.
dashboard.dueExercisesDesc: Spaced repetition drills waiting for you

problem.title: New Problem
problem.subtitle: Type your question naturally and switch to formula mode to insert math anywhere — fractions, limits, integrals, and more.
problem.inputHint: Type instructions and math together. Use the text/formula toggle on the right to switch modes. Tap the field on mobile for the math keyboard.
problem.placeholder: e.g. Evaluate the limit as x approaches 0… switch to formula mode to insert the expression
problem.needFormula: Switch to formula mode and insert at least one expression
problem.createError: Could not create session. Try again.
problem.analyzeDesc: Classify the problem without starting a session — useful for demos.
problem.analyzeError: Analysis failed. Is the backend running?
problem.tip1: Be specific — include the exact expression, not just a topic name
problem.tip2: Use the formula mode toggle to insert formulas inline — no need to type LaTeX manually
problem.tip3: One problem at a time works best — the tutor builds on your answers step by step

indeterminate.label: Indeterminate form
indeterminate.hint: Think about the standard sin(x)/x limit

lhopital.label: L'Hôpital's rule
lhopital.hint: What happens to exponentials vs polynomials at infinity?

implicit.label: Implicit differentiation
implicit.hint: Differentiate both sides with respect to x

product.label: Product rule
product.hint: Which rule applies when two functions are multiplied?

parts.label: Integration by parts
parts.hint: Use LIATE to choose u and dv

definite.label: Definite integral
definite.hint: Apply the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus

chat.title: Tutor Chat
chat.subtitle: Continue an active session or start a new problem.
chat.noSessions: No sessions yet. Create a problem to begin.
chat.kickoff: I'd like to work through this problem step by step.
chat.milestonesCompleteHint: All milestones complete — personalized practice is ready on your Dashboard.
chat.startingDesc: The tutor will analyze your problem and ask the first guiding question.
chat.inputHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line, use the text/formula toggle to switch input mode
chat.placeholder: Type your reasoning or answer… (Enter to send, toggle formula for math)

exercises.title: Practice Drills
exercises.subtitle: Work through personalised problems from completed tutoring sessions.
exercises.completeSessionHint: Complete a tutoring session to receive new drill sets
exercises.loadError: Could not load exercises. Check that you are logged in.
exercises.noDue: No exercises are due right now.
exercises.noSetsHint: Finish a tutor session and click Complete to generate a set.
exercises.notFound: Exercise set not found or you do not have access.
exercises.quickDesc: One targeted problem based on your weakest topic — not saved to history.
exercises.generateHint: Click Generate for a personalised drill without starting a full tutoring session.
exercises.generateError: Could not generate a practice problem. Is the backend running?
exercises.workPlaceholder: Show your steps or final answer…
exercises.saveError: Could not save your attempt. Please try again.
exercises.answerUnavailable: Answer not available yet. Mark the problem complete first.

report.title: Learning Report
report.subtitle: Personalised mastery analysis and practice recommendations.
report.loadError: Unable to load learning report. Please try again.
report.noHistory: Complete a tutoring session to see your mastery timeline.
report.tipPlaceholder: Start a session and we will generate personalised advice.
report.strengthsPlaceholder: Keep practicing — strengths appear at 70%+ mastery.
report.areasDesc: Topics below 40% mastery or recurring errors
report.errorDesc: Most frequent mistakes from recent sessions
report.allSetsDesc: All exercise sets and their completion status
report.noDrillsHint: Complete a tutoring session to receive personalised exercises.

trace.title: Agent Trace
trace.empty: Agent decisions will appear here as the session runs.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalise your tutoring experience.
settings.saveError: Could not save preferences. Please try again.
settings.hintStyleDesc: How aggressively the tutor escalates hints when you are stuck.
settings.latexEnabledDesc: Enable MathLive formula editor in chat and problem input.
settings.notificationsDesc: Alerts for practice and learning milestones.
settings.notifyExercisesDesc: Notify when spaced-repetition drills are due.
